---
title: "Site Null-Category Regression Fixture"
---

# Welcome

This is the home page of an `rmarkdown::render_site` project.

The manifest sets `content_category: null` (rather than `"site"`), so prior
to the fix in vivid-blender#1863 the doc-render branch ran instead of the
site branch. The Go-side change now also looks for `_site.yml` in the
content directory and routes through the site path when found, so this
content publishes correctly.
